summary: Complete testing of school logo integration for TeacherHubPro. Backend API (7/7 tests passed) correctly returns school_name and school_logo_url fields. Frontend StudentAssignment page correctly shows school name with GraduationCap fallback icon when no logo URL exists. PDF generation code path verified to pass schoolName and schoolLogoUrl to generateTestPDF.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ai_grading.py (lines 380-394): Correctly looks up school via class_doc.school_id and returns school_name, school_logo_url
Frontend StudentAssignment.js (lines 327-338): Correct conditional rendering - img tag with data-testid='school-logo' when logo exists, GraduationCap fallback otherwise
Frontend StudentAssignment.js (line 342-343): School name displayed with format 'School — Class'
Frontend generateTestPDF.js (lines 49-68): School logo and name rendering in PDF header implemented correctly
Frontend Gradebook.js (lines 117, 129-135, 333-334): schoolInfo state fetched on load and passed to buildPDFData
seed_data_creation: Used existing test assignment with token: 2ae35432d130
context_for_next_testing_agent: School logo integration fully tested. Test school 'My School' has empty logo_url, so GraduationCap fallback is expected. API returns school_name and school_logo_url correctly. PDF generation includes schoolName and schoolLogoUrl in buildPDFData. StudentAssignment page shows 'My School — English 4A' format with fallback icon.

backend_api.GET /api/ai-grading/student/{token} retu: PASS - returns '' (empty, expected for test school)

frontend_ui.data-testid='school-logo' for img tag: PASS - correctly not present when logo_url is empty
